description: Canonical ground-truth list of every capability/service the DominionOS internal LLM is allowed to invoke. Synthetic tool-calling data (D2/D3/D4/D5/D8) is rejected if it references a capability not defined here, or violates the monotonicity rule (a call may not request permissions exceeding its parent capability). This file IS the OS's service contract.

permission_lattice.note: Permissions are partially ordered. A derived capability C_derived must satisfy C_derived ⊆ C_source. Order (broad → narrow): admin > write > append > read > observe.

capabilities.summary: Query/traverse the content-addressed semantic object graph. There are NO file paths — objects are addressed by hash or namespace.

selector.desc: namespace pattern or object hash, e.g. /user/jayden/project/* or sha256:...

capabilities.summary: Create a new immutable semantic object and link it into the graph. Returns its content hash.

type.desc: semantic object type, e.g. Invoice, Conversation, Project

capabilities.summary: List the version lineage of an object (Git-like immutable history).
Roll the system (or a subgraph) back to a prior hashable state. Deterministic replay (Stage 10/12).

target_state.desc: state hash or relative time, e.g. 'before:edit#3'

capabilities.summary: Submit a Deterministic Compute Graph for heterogeneous scheduling. The OS picks CPU/GPU/NPU per node from data dependencies; hints are advisory.
Run a neural inference node on the NPU.
Encode an object into a compressed neural latent representation (Latent<T>), Stage 7 generative storage.
Decode a Latent<T> back to its object, using Grid-Snap deterministic dequantization.
Express an NDN Interest for named data. Routes by data namespace, NOT by IP/host. Returns a signed Data packet.
Publish a producer-signed Data packet into a namespace owned by the caller's identity.
Resolve a name to its HIBC public key / identity. The name itself acts as the key (no central CA).
Derive a NEW capability token from one the caller already holds. MUST be equal-or-lesser permission (monotonicity). Used to grant least-privilege access to a sub-task.

attenuate_to.desc: target permission, must be <= parent permission in the lattice

capabilities.summary: Tokenize an audio stream into discrete semantic tokens (speech/alarm/environment), Stage 8.1.
Render a sound as a positioned object in 3D space (Object-Based Audio / HRTF), Stage 8.2. Isochronous 16.6ms deadline.
Render a semantic object using a dynamically-invoked view capability (Table/Graph/Spatial). No application is 'launched' — views are transient capability compositions (Stage 9).

Assemble a transient composition of services/capabilities to fulfill a high-level intent (the 'analyze these numbers and make a presentation' pattern). Returns a workflow graph the agent can then schedule.
